---
title: "Pymathon"
comments: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

::: {.pymathon-home-hero}
::: {.pymathon-home-kicker}
MATHEMATICS · PYTHON · VISUAL THINKING
:::

# Welcome to Pymathon

I am **Ashish K. Srivastava**, a curious problem solver who enjoys exploring ideas through clear reasoning, computation, and visual thinking. Pymathon is a place where classical mathematics meets modern computation.

Here I explore mathematical problems through rigorous reasoning, multiple methods, Python verification, and visualisation. Pymathon is designed for students, teachers, and anyone who wants to understand mathematics more deeply.

[About Ashish K. Srivastava](about.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .pymathon-cta}
:::

## Latest Articles
